summary: Backend testing completed for BTP Facture SaaS Trial & OTP Architecture. All 9 features tested successfully. 24/25 tests passed (1 minor health endpoint test fixed). Complete registration → OTP verification → trial activation flow verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Code architecture is clean and modular under /app/backend/app/
OTP service uses bcrypt hashing correctly
Rate limiting is properly implemented (5/hour for registration, 60s cooldown for resend)
Trial management fields are correctly structured (trial_pending → trial_active)
Stripe preparation fields are in place but NOT integrated (as expected)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during registration tests (prefixed with test_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial & OTP architecture fully tested. Rate limiting is strict (5 registrations/hour) - wait between test runs. OTP codes are logged in development mode with format [DEV MODE] OTP CODE GENERATED. Email sending is MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

Registration creates user with plan='tri.details: Registration returns {requires_verification: true, user_id: '...'} and creates user with trial_pending status

OTP generation with bcrypt hashing and s.details: OTP is generated using secrets module, hashed with bcrypt, and stored in email_verifications collection

OTP verification activates trial: plan='.details: Verified via complete flow test - OTP verification returns tokens and activates account

Login blocked for unverified users (HTTP.details: Unverified users get 403 with message 'Email non vérifié. Un nouveau code a été envoyé.'

Login works for verified users.details: Super admin (pre-verified) can login. Verified users after OTP can login successfully.

Resend OTP rate limiting (60 seconds coo.details: Rate limiting returns 429 when exceeded. Cooldown and hourly limits enforced.

User document contains Stripe preparatio.details: User model includes stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, subscription_status, current_period_end (all null - prepared but not integrated)

OTP code logged in development mode in b.details: OTP codes logged with format: [DEV MODE] OTP CODE GENERATED | Email: ... | OTP Code: XXXXXX | Expires: 10 minutes

TTL index on email_verifications collect.details: TTL index created on expires_at field via otp_service.init_indexes()

mocked_apis_list: SMTP email sending - MOCKED when SMTP_USER/SMTP_PASS not set. OTP codes logged to console in development mode.
Stripe integration - Fields prepared but NOT integrated (stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, etc. are null)

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All features working as expected.
